metadata.title: Clinica Hispana Airline Houston | Spanish Speaking Doctors Houston TX
metadata.description: Hispanic medical clinic in Houston, TX. Professional healthcare 100% in Spanish, walk-ins welcome, we accept patients with or without insurance. Family medicine, immigration exams, laboratory and more.
metadata.ogDescription: Your trusted clinic in Houston. Professional medical care in Spanish for the whole family. Walk-ins welcome, affordable prices. 491 reviews 5 stars on Google.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to common questions
faq.a1: No, we accept walk-in patients. Simply come to our clinic during business hours and we'll see you as soon as possible. However, if you prefer to secure a specific time slot, you can call us to make an appointment.
faq.q2: Do you accept patients without insurance?
faq.a2: Yes, we accept patients with or without medical insurance. We offer affordable prices and flexible payment plans so everyone can receive the medical care they need.
faq.q3: Do you speak Spanish at the clinic?
faq.a3: Yes, all our staff speaks Spanish. Our clinic was specifically created to serve Houston's Hispanic community, and we make sure you can communicate comfortably in your language.
faq.a4: We're open Monday through Sunday. Our regular hours are 9:00 AM to 9:00 PM Monday through Friday, and 10:00 AM to 6:00 PM on weekends. Please call us to confirm hours on holidays.
faq.q5: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a5: We accept cash, all major credit and debit cards (Visa, MasterCard, American Express, Discover), and most medical insurance plans. We also work with various state and federal insurance programs.
faq.a6: Yes, we offer flexible payment plans to help you manage your healthcare costs. Talk to our receptionist about the options available for your particular situation.
